column6:
This configuration should be based off of the 
default AMAG config as these will be installed 
by AMAG.

The BLE will advertise as AMAG and work with the Symmetry Blue app until keys are rolled.

column1: CC Updated on 2/11/20 - Added WS Versions

JB Updated on 10/6/2021 - Removed WS versions. They were added because Midfirst wanted to configure CAM1 readers they bought in a pinch during Covid and later update them to the matching configuration. They later decided not to configure them and didn't purchase the config card. They have only ever ordered MCLP readers.
